summary_en: 404,100 shares acquired (3.9% of shares outstanding) for ¥560.1M via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-15. Acquisition completed; cancellation scheduled 2026-05-29. Post-cancellation shares outstanding: 10,085,374 (treasury: 256,826 excluding J-ESOP trust holdings of 365,300).
title_en: Notice of Completion of Self-Share Acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction, Termination of Self-Share Acquisition Program, and Planned Cancellation of Self-Shares
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-15, Kyowa Nissei completed an off-exchange self-share acquisition program via ToSTNeT-3, purchasing 404,100 ordinary shares (3.9% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury) for a total of ¥560,082,600. The acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 2026-05-14 under an upper limit of 500,000 shares and ¥693 million. The company states the buyback is part of capital policy execution aimed at enhancing shareholder returns and improving capital efficiency. The acquired shares will be cancelled on 2026-05-29. After cancellation, shares outstanding (excluding treasury) will be 10,085,374, with 256,826 shares retained in treasury (excluding 365,300 shares held in J-ESOP trust). The acquisition program is now terminated.
